content.text:
Based on the visual inspection of the molecule, atom index 12 is a Nitrogen (N) atom located in the center of the structure.

The atoms covalently connected to N:12 are:
*   Atom C:11 (Carbon)
*   Atom C:13 (Carbon)
*   Atom S:15 (Sulfur)
*   Atom O:17 (Oxygen)

**Neighbor Atoms:**
*   Index 11 (Element: C)
*   Index 13 (Element: C)
*   Index 15 (Element: S)
*   Index 17 (Element: O)

**geomconf_index:** geomconf_8573

question: Please find neighbour atoms of atom index 12 (element: N). Neighbour atoms are covalently connected. Report their atomic indices and elements. Also return the geomconf_index.
